ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (0: Female, 1: Male) */,
  "indigeneity" INTEGER /* Indigeneity status of the individual (0: Non-Indigenous, 1: Indigenous) */,
  "high_school" INTEGER /* High school completion status (0: Not Completed, 1: Completed) */,
  "partnered" INTEGER /* Partnership status (0: Single, 1: Partnered) */,
  "remoteness" INTEGER /* Remoteness of the individual's location (0: Urban, 1: Rural) */,
  "language" INTEGER /* Primary language spoken (0: Non-English, 1: English) */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Smoking status (0: Non-Smoker, 1: Smoker) */,
  "risky_alcohol" INTEGER /* Risky alcohol consumption status (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "psyc_distress" INTEGER /* Level of psychological distress (0-100) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "individual_name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "income_level" INTEGER /* Income level of the individual */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any existing health conditions */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Any medications the individual is taking */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of health conditions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_risky_alcohol FOREIGN KEY ("risky_alcohol") REFERENCES alcohol_types ("alcohol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_smoker FOREIGN KEY ("smoker") REFERENCES smoking_types ("smoking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_partnered FOREIGN KEY ("partnered") REFERENCES partnership_types ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES language_types ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_types ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_psyc_distress FOREIGN KEY ("psyc_distress") REFERENCES psych_distress_types ("psych_distress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_indigeneity FOREIGN KEY ("indigeneity") REFERENCES indigeneity_types ("indigeneity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_high_school FOREIGN KEY ("high_school") REFERENCES education_types ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_remoteness FOREIGN KEY ("remoteness") REFERENCES remoteness_types ("remoteness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_types" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indigeneity_types" (
  "indigeneity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indigeneity category */,
  "indigeneity_name" TEXT /* Name of the indigeneity category (e.g., Non-Indigenous, Indigenous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indigeneity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_types" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education category */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education category (e.g., Not Completed, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnership_types" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership status */,
  "partnership_name" TEXT /* Name of the partnership status (e.g., Single, Partnered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remoteness_types" (
  "remoteness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remoteness category */,
  "remoteness_name" TEXT /* Name of the remoteness category (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remoteness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_types" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language category */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language category (e.g., Non-English, English) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_types" (
  "smoking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking status */,
  "smoking_name" TEXT /* Name of the smoking status (e.g., Non-Smoker, Smoker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohol_types" (
  "alcohol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcohol consumption category */,
  "alcohol_name" TEXT /* Name of the alcohol consumption category (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alcohol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psych_distress_types" (
  "psych_distress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level of psychological distress */,
  "psych_distress_name" TEXT /* Name of the psychological distress level (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psych_distress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare provider, policymaker) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_health_conditions" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `individuals` table */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `health_conditions` table */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_medications" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `individuals` table */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `medications` table */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id", "medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family history entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `individuals` table */,
  "family_member" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `health_conditions` table */,
  "onset_age" INTEGER /* Age at which the condition was diagnosed in the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_history_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES health_conditions ("condition_id")
)
